calendar.matters:
Further Supplemental Petition For Order Confirming Trust Asset
Off Calendar Oct-20-2009 Granted Per Written Order

Supplemental Petition For Confirminf Truat Assets.
Off Calendar Oct-29-2008 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Successor Trustee And Trust Assets
Off Calendar Apr-08-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jerome Marks for Frederick Reid (Petitioner).

Mr. Marks stated that he had submitted a further declaration this morning. In addition, he stated that he was requesting designation of the beneficiary in the Citibank IRA account, that there was some question as to who was named beneficiary and referred to the letters he received from Citibank. Mr. Marks expressed that the decedent clearly intended to include all of the assets in the trust. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera/ S. Ravinantapricha.
